introSection: Familienachterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Schloß Beck Freizeitpark in Bottrop, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Familienachterbahn opened in 1987.

In 2002, a tunnel was added to the ride, enclosing the lift hill.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Familienachterbahn is a Tivoli Medium coaster from Zierer.

fullText:
Familienachterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Schloß Beck Freizeitpark in Bottrop, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

Familienachterbahn opened in 1987.

In 2002, a tunnel was added to the ride, enclosing the lift hill.

Familienachterbahn is a Tivoli Medium coaster from Zierer.

Red track and yellow supports.
